text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An era of dazzling powerhouses. Collectively,
these racers are known as the Golden Generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And right now, those very racers are gathered in
my office, all for a single purpose.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hot pot preparations, begin!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right. They're all here today for a hot-pot
party, and they've brought all kinds of
ingredients with them.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! I'm so happy! I can't believe we get to
close out the year together with a hot-pot party!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! Tsuru, are you crying?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Yeah! These onions I'm cutting are killer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey King, do you know how to peel veggies?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
O-of course I do! Um, let's see! How do I hold the
knife again?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hm, doesn't seem like I can take it easy... Oh,
well. Here, hand that knife to me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The most important thing about a hot pot is
making sure it's nice and colorful. Adding a few
flowers should do the job. ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I see... Qué?! Are those dandelions you're
putting in?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Look at all the veggies, meat, and seafood!
The pot's practically overflowing with goodies
thanks to everyone's contributions!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The giant hairy crab that's sitting on top of
everything makes a real impact, too! Talk about a
centerpiece! Mm, it looks so yummy!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: All right, let's eat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, the atmosphere in the room shifts
dramatically, and everyone's eyes start gleaming
with a ferocious hunger!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Raaargh! That crab is MIIINE!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Urk! Of course everyone would start fighting over
the centerpiece right away! I can't find a single
opening to take advantage of!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Good work, everyone. I'll take this opportunity to
sneak my way in... Oh, this scallop looks about
ready.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hraaagh! Mid-Air Condor STRIKE! That crab
belongs to me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! Where'd it go?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Taking the time to use a flashy move, hm? How
carefree you are, El. But you left yourself wide
open, and now the crab is mine.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Not so fast! This fight isn't over yet!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, that was so yummy! I'm stuffed!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe? What are you giggling about?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was just thinking about how this hot-pot
party was like being in a race with everyone.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The meal turned out great because we're all here.
It was fun both cooking together and fighting
playfully over our food.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's the same during races—we run together and
do our best to come out on top...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Of course none of us want to lose, but even then,
we do whatever we can to support each other.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It just struck me that everything has been so fun
because you're all along for the ride.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. What a lovely way to end our night. That
was very touching, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But although the night may be drawing to a close,
our days of racing are far from over. We still have
plenty of battles left on the track.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know. But I'll be the last one to stand on
the winner's podium! That's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Just like I claimed victory over the hot-pot party
tonight! Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week beams—the big, empty crab shell
lying picked clean on her plate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Golden Generation looks back on the days
they've shared together and renews their vow to
continue racing toward tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We won't let you win that easily, though. After
all, claiming that crab wasn't so easy, now was it?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Right. After all that fuss, we just ended up sharing
it... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh well! Let's just call it a draw for today! Now,
it's time to make some porridge with the
leftovers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Golden Generation looks back on the days
they've shared together and renews their vow to
continue racing toward tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I know I let victory slip through my fingers today... But it won't happen again! Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Slightly confused, I follow her gaze down to see...
Her now empty plate, without so much as a single
crab leg shell. Guess she didn't manage to snag
any...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Golden Generation looks back on the days
they've shared together and renew their vow to
continue racing toward tomorrow.
